
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)

clean_percent_column <- function(x) {
  x %>%
    str_trim() %>%
    
    # fix OCR-like patterns
    str_replace_all("^IV\\.", "14.") %>%
    str_replace_all("^III\\.", "111.") %>%
    str_replace_all("^II\\.", "11.") %>%
    str_replace_all("^I\\.", "1.") %>%
    
    # fix suffix cases
    str_replace_all("\\.VII$", ".7") %>%
    str_replace_all("\\.VI$", ".6") %>%
    str_replace_all("\\.V$", ".5") %>%
    str_replace_all("\\.IV$", ".4") %>%
    str_replace_all("\\.III$", ".3") %>%
    str_replace_all("\\.II$", ".2") %>%
    str_replace_all("\\.I$", ".1") %>%
    
    # remove leading zeros like 04.7 → 4.7
    str_replace("^0+", "") %>%
    
    na_if("") %>%
    as.numeric()
}
```

```{r}
vaccinations_clean <- vaccinations %>%
  mutate(
    date = dmy(date),
    total_vaccinations_per_hundred = clean_percent_column(total_vaccinations_per_hundred),
    people_vaccinated_per_hundred = clean_percent_column(people_vaccinated_per_hundred),
    people_fully_vaccinated_per_hundred = clean_percent_column(people_fully_vaccinated_per_hundred),
    total_boosters_per_hundred = clean_percent_column(total_boosters_per_hundred)
  )
```


```{r}
summary(vaccinations_clean$total_vaccinations_per_hundred)
```


```{r}
vaccinations %>%
  mutate(cleaned = clean_percent_column(total_vaccinations_per_hundred)) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(total_vaccinations_per_hundred) &
    is.na(cleaned)
  ) %>%
  distinct(total_vaccinations_per_hundred)
```


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)

roman_to_number <- function(x) {
  case_when(
    x == "I" ~ 1,
    x == "II" ~ 2,
    x == "III" ~ 3,
    x == "IV" ~ 4,
    x == "V" ~ 5,
    x == "VI" ~ 6,
    x == "VII" ~ 7,
    x == "VIII" ~ 8,
    x == "IX" ~ 9,
    x == "X" ~ 10,
    x == "XI" ~ 11,
    x == "XII" ~ 12,
    TRUE ~ NA_real_
  )
}

parse_mixed_number <- function(x) {
  if (is.na(x) || x == "") return(NA_real_)
  
  x <- str_trim(x)
  
  # normal numeric value
  if (str_detect(x, "^[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$")) {
    return(as.numeric(x))
  }
  
  # values like I.51, II.55, IV.22, V.14, 01.VIII, 03.XI
  if (str_detect(x, "^[A-Z0-9]+\\.[A-Z0-9]+$")) {
    parts <- str_split(x, "\\.", simplify = TRUE)
    left <- parts[1]
    right <- parts[2]
    
    left_num <- if (str_detect(left, "^[0-9]+$")) {
      as.numeric(left)
    } else {
      roman_to_number(left)
    }
    
    right_num <- if (str_detect(right, "^[0-9]+$")) {
      as.numeric(right)
    } else {
      roman_to_number(right)
    }
    
    if (is.na(left_num) || is.na(right_num)) {
      return(NA_real_)
    }
    
    # decimal reconstruction: V.14 -> 5.14, 01.VIII -> 1.08
    return(left_num + right_num / 100)
  }
  
  NA_real_
}

clean_percent_column <- function(x) {
  sapply(x, parse_mixed_number)
}
```


```{r}

```


```{r}
vaccinations_clean <- vaccinations %>%
  mutate(
    date = dmy(date),
    total_vaccinations_per_hundred = clean_percent_column(total_vaccinations_per_hundred),
    people_vaccinated_per_hundred = clean_percent_column(people_vaccinated_per_hundred),
    people_fully_vaccinated_per_hundred = clean_percent_column(people_fully_vaccinated_per_hundred),
    total_boosters_per_hundred = clean_percent_column(total_boosters_per_hundred)
  )
```


```{r}
problem_values <- vaccinations %>%
  mutate(cleaned = clean_percent_column(total_vaccinations_per_hundred)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(total_vaccinations_per_hundred) & is.na(cleaned)) %>%
  distinct(total_vaccinations_per_hundred)

problem_values
```


```{r}
summary(vaccinations_clean$total_vaccinations_per_hundred)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

vaccinations_clean %>%
  filter(!is.na(people_fully_vaccinated_per_hundred)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = people_fully_vaccinated_per_hundred, color = location)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(
    title = "Vaccination Progress Over Time",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Fully Vaccinated per 100"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
```{r}
countries <- c("Germany", "France", "United States", "India")

vaccinations_clean %>%
  filter(location %in% countries,
         !is.na(total_vaccinations_per_hundred)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = total_vaccinations_per_hundred, color = location)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  labs(
    title = "Vaccination Progress Comparison",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Total vaccinations per 100 people"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
top_countries <- vaccinations_clean %>%
  group_by(location) %>%
  summarise(max_vac = max(total_vaccinations_per_hundred, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(desc(max_vac)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  pull(location)
```

```{r}
vaccinations_clean %>%
  filter(location %in% top_countries,
         !is.na(total_vaccinations_per_hundred)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = total_vaccinations_per_hundred, color = location)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  labs(
    title = "Top performers",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Total vaccinations per 100 people"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
theme_minimal() +
theme(
  plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
  legend.position = "right"
)
```

```{r}
country_summary <- vaccinations_clean %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(people_fully_vaccinated_per_hundred),
    !is.na(daily_vaccinations_per_million)
  ) %>%
  group_by(location) %>%
  summarise(
    max_vaccinated = max(people_fully_vaccinated_per_hundred, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_daily_vaccinations = mean(daily_vaccinations_per_million, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```

```{r}
ggplot(country_summary,
       aes(x = max_vaccinated, y = avg_daily_vaccinations)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "red") +
  labs(
    title = "Vaccination Coverage vs Daily Vaccination Rate",
    x = "Fully vaccinated per 100 people",
    y = "Daily vaccinations per million people"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
install.packages("ggrepel")

```

```{r}
library(ggrepel)
label_data <- country_summary %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_daily_vaccinations)) %>%
  slice(1:6)  
```

```{r}
ggplot(country_summary,
       aes(x = max_vaccinated, y = avg_daily_vaccinations)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "red") +
  
  geom_text_repel(
    data = label_data,
    aes(label = location),
    size = 4
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Vaccination Coverage vs Daily Vaccination Rate",
    x = "Fully vaccinated per 100 people",
    y = "Daily vaccinations per million people"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
country_summary <- vaccinations_clean %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(people_fully_vaccinated_per_hundred),
    !is.na(daily_vaccinations_per_million)
  ) %>%
  group_by(location) %>%
  summarise(
    max_vaccinated = max(people_fully_vaccinated_per_hundred, na.rm = TRUE),
    peak_rate = max(daily_vaccinations_per_million, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_vaccinations = max(total_vaccinations, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  filter(total_vaccinations > 1e6)   
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(country_summary,
       aes(x = max_vaccinated, y = peak_rate)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "red") +
  
  labs(
    title = "Vaccination Performance Across Countries (Filtered)",
    x = "Fully vaccinated per 100 people",
    y = "Peak daily vaccinations per million"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
library(ggrepel)

label_data <- country_summary %>%
  arrange(desc(peak_rate)) %>%
  slice(1:8)

ggplot(country_summary,
       aes(x = max_vaccinated, y = peak_rate)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "red") +
  
  geom_text_repel(
    data = label_data,
    aes(label = location),
    size = 4
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```
